title: Factors to Note Ahead of Generac's (GNRC) Q3 Earnings Release
text: Dampened sales in the Residential Products business hurt Generac's (GNRC) Q3 performance.

title: Generac Holdings: The Pink Energy Crisis Is Not Over
text: The Pink Energy lawsuit and GNRC's lowered FY2022 guidance have naturally spooked Mr. Market, further plummeting its stock by -68.53% plunge YTD. With the deceleration of orders and consequently top-and-bottom-line growth ahead, GNRC is in for more pain indeed, attributed to the overly bearish stock market.

title: Generac: The Cheaper Alternative To Enphase Energy
text: Generac shares are down nearly 80% in the past year from their all-time high of $524/share. Generac is now trading at its lowest valuation (EV/EBITDA) multiple since its IPO in 2010.

title: Generac: The Market Has Sent Patient Investors A Gift With The Panic Selloff
text: Leading power generator company Generac's Q3 prelim earnings release stunned the market, as management revised its Q3 and FY22 guidance markedly downwards. However, we gleaned that the market had already anticipated significant challenges, as it sent GNRC tumbling from its recent August highs.

title: Why Generac Holdings (GNRC) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Generac Holdings (GNRC) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Generac (GNRC) Slashes Guidance for 2022, Stock Plummets 25%
text: Generac Holdings (GNRC) announces third-quarter preliminary results and updated guidance for the full-year 2022.

title: Generac Shares Have Been Decimated: Down From $500 To The $100 Level
text: Generac is a leader in the backup generator market which appears to be poised for long-term growth. With the shares now back at pre-pandemic levels, I think it makes sense to start a small position, and average in over the next several months.

title: Generac stock rocked after profit warning due to weakness in home generator business
text: Shares of Generac Holdings Inc. suffered a record selloff on Wednesday after the manufacturer of home generators and solar equipment issued an earnings warning and cut its growth outlook, citing pressure on residential sales.

title: Generac Stock Eyes Worst Day Ever on Preliminary Q3 Results
text: Generac Holdings Inc (NYSE:GNRC) is sinking this afternoon, last seen down 25.1% to trade at $110.67, after the company's preliminary third-quarter earnings and revenue came in well below Wall Street's expectations.

title: Why Generac Stock Is Plunging 20% Today
text: Generac still sees sales growth in 2022 of more than 20%, but that's nearly half of what it once thought.

title: Generac Holdings technical outlook: is selling now overdone?
text: Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE:GNRC) was at the centre of accelerated selloffs on Wednesday. The stock crashed by 14% in premarket after news of disappointing preliminary third-quarter results and guidance.

title: Generac shares are down 25% on Wednesday: explore why
text: Generac Holdings Inc (NYSE: GNRC) is down nearly 25% on Wednesday after the maker of backup power generators reported its preliminary results for the third quarter that came in well below the Street estimates.

title: Generac (GNRC) Stock Sinks 20% on Lowered Guidance
text: Generac (NYSE: GNRC ) stock is falling on Wednesday after the energy technology manufacturing company lowered its guidance for 2022. Starting off that guidance cut is the company now expecting a net sales growth range of 22% to 24%.

title: Why Generac Shares Are Getting Obliterated Today - Generac Hldgs (NYSE:GNRC)
text: Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE: GNRC) shares are trading lower by 19.98% to $118.12 Wednesday morning after the company reported preliminary third-quarter EPS results are lower year over year. The company also lowered its FY22 net sales growth guidance and net income margin.

title: Generac stock tumbles toward 2-year low after big profit and sales misses, lowered outlook
text: Shares of Generac Holdings Inc. GNRC, +2.63% sank 10.7% toward a more than two-year low in premarket trading Wednesday, after the maker of home and industrial power systems reported third-quarter profit and sales that fell well below expectations and cut its full-year outlook, citing disappointing residential sales. Net income fell to $58 million, or 83 cents a share, from $132 million, or $1.93 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Generac Announces Preliminary Third Quarter 2022 Results
text: WAUKESHA, Wis., Oct. 19, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE: GNRC) (“Generac” or the “Company”), a leading global designer and manufacturer of energy technology solutions and other power products, today announced selected preliminary financial results for its third quarter ended September 30, 2022 and provided an update on its outlook for the full year 2022. Generac also announced plans to release its full third quarter 2022 financial results before the market opens on Wednesday, November 2, 2022 and hold a conference call at 10:00 a.m. EDT on that day to discuss the Company's operating results and updated outlook in more detail.

title: Generac Power Systems and EODev Announce Agreement Bringing Large-Scale, Zero-Emissions Hydrogen Fuel Cell Power Generators to North America
text: WAUKESHA, Wis.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Generac Power Systems (NYSE: GNRC), a leading global designer and manufacturer of energy technology solutions and other power products, and EODev, a French developer and manufacturer of zero-emission hydrogen fuel cell power generators, today announced a formal distribution agreement.
